portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: A curated selection of work spanning landscapes, portraits, and intimate moments.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The eye behind the lens
about.bio1: Laura Peixoto is a Belo Horizonte-based photographer with over a decade of experience capturing the beauty in everyday moments. Her work blends documentary sensitivity with a refined aesthetic sensibility.
about.bio2: Trained in visual arts and self-taught in photography, Laura has developed a distinctive style that celebrates natural light, human connection, and the quiet poetry of the world around us.
about.bio3: Her work has been exhibited across Brazil and internationally, and has appeared in leading lifestyle and editorial publications.

services.title: Services
services.editorial_desc: Magazine spreads, brand campaigns, and visual storytelling.
services.portrait_desc: Individual, family, and corporate portrait sessions.
services.events_desc: Weddings, cultural events, and private celebrations.
services.fine_art_desc: Limited edition prints available for purchase.
